text: As I approach and then stand within this space dedicated to research and development, I feel a mixture of curiosity and reflection. The R+D on the wall beckons me to contemplate progress—how invention and inquiry shape our world. Surrounded by technology and exhibits, I feel a tiny thrill at the potential for discovery, yet also a quiet humility at all I have yet to understand. This is a threshold between the known and unknown, and being here awakens a sense of wonder and readiness to question everything.
